features: Introducing our Floral Fragranced Room Spray, a perfect addition to your home decor. With a variety of scents to choose from, this room spray is ideal for all occasions and rooms in your house.
The 250ml size makes it easy to carry around and the modern style adds a touch of elegance to your living space.

This room spray is not just scented, but also an odour eliminator, making it perfect for aromatherapy. The Floral brand is known for its quality products and this room spray is no exception. It is a must-have for anyone who loves floral-themed home fragrance. Get your hands on this amazing room spray today!
